ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Continued To Mar-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on March 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the receipt for the blocked account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (330 Mill Rd, Martinez, Ca 94553)
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Arica Ramos in Propria Persona.

Ms. Ramos stated that she will proceed by way of a blocked account. The sale was confirmed at $172,500.00 for a 50% interest in the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 18, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale will be paid to the Clerk of the Court and then deposited into a blocked account. Ms. Ramos is to provide an order for the blocked account, open the blocked account in advance and then file a receipt. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is set for February 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Arica Ramos (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about parties being appointed to administer estates without the guidance of an Attorney, spoke of technical issues, rules and statutes that govern how estates are to proceed, stated that not having an attorney results in extra time spent and extra costs especially when there is a piece property that is owned by two estates in two different counties and asked Ms. Ramos if she knows what the next step is. Ms. Ramos stated that she is not going to hire an attorney, that she has dealt with three other Siblings who have passed away, and that she already sent out letters to all of the beneficiaries and to Health Services. Ms. Ramos also stated that there are a few pieces of property that were not in the Trust so she looked at the will which is why she is here, that an appraisal has been done for the condominium in Contra Costa County (not by a Probate Referee), and that she is dealing with similar issues in Contra Costa. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with only limited powers (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for October 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution is set for December 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Ms. Ramos that she needs to be aware of the set dates/deadlines.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Continued To Jun-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
